methodology: proximity_release_score = sum(2024 TRI release lbs / (distance_mi^2 + 1)) over EPA TRI-reporting facilities. score is the 0-100 percentile RANK of that burden across the compared listings (Low/Moderate/High = lower/middle/upper third). Facilities limited to TRI reporters, RMP chemical-accident facilities, and OSM industrial features; EPA FRS registry-only points excluded. cancer_risk and pm25 are null because EJScreen was unreachable at build time. Relative industrial-proximity screening signal, not an absolute concentration or a medical/health prediction.
